title: New website prototype
body: A lightweight static version of the Quantum Technology Group website is being prototyped on GitHub Pages.

title: Time-of-flight spectroscopy with ultrafast all-optical gating
body: Recent publication in Optics Express demonstrating time-of-flight spectroscopy with ultrafast all-optical gating.

title: Programmable photonic quantum circuits with ultrafast time-bin encoding
body: Publication in Physical Review Letters highlighting programmable photonic quantum circuits based on ultrafast time-bin encoding.
